name: Congressman Byron Donalds
tweet: For over 15 years, @CapitolPolice Officer Howard Liebengood dutifully served the halls of Congress & his community.   Erika & I are praying for everyone that knew and loved Officer Liebengood. May his selfless service and life never be forgotten.

name: Congressman Byron Donalds
tweet: I join the nation in mourning the tragic passing of @CapitolPolice Officer Brian D. Sicknick. Erika & I send our deepest condolences to his beloved family & his fellow brothers & sisters in blue. May we never forget the life & sacrifice of Officer Sicknick.
